_note: Closes the flagged Iulus->gens Julia->Caesar bridge. The gens Julia claimed descent from Iulus (Ascanius), son of Aeneas, through the goddess Venus -- a family tradition, NOT a documented line (the ~600 years between Iulus and the historical Julii are legendary), flagged as such via a kind:bridge node. Adds Julius Caesar himself (previously absent) and connects the historical Julii to the existing ATIA (Augustus's mother, formerly a parentless root). Also weds Caesar to the existing Cleopatra VII (-> Caesarion) and to Cornelia (-> his daughter Julia). ROM_ASCANIUS (Iulus) and ATIA & CLEOPATRA7 pre-exist.
